channel.title: LLM Timeline — Huawei Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Huawei.

item.title: Pangu Pro MoE (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 72.0B License: open Type: model AI model by Huawei

item.title: Pangu Ultra MoE (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 718B License: closed Type: model AI model by Huawei

item.title: Pangu Ultra MoE (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: Pangu Ultra MoE License: closed Type: model 718B-A39B. Trained on 6,000 Ascend NPUs (Kunpeng 920 processors in Huawei Atlas 800T A2 servers).

item.title: Pangu Ultra (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 135B License: closed Type: model AI model by Huawei

item.title: Dream 7B (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: Dream 7B License: open Type: model "with Huawei Noah’s Ark Lab, we [Hong Kong University] release Dream 7B (Diffusion reasoning model), the most powerful open diffusion large language model to date."

item.title: Pangu Ultra (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: Pangu Ultra License: open Type: model Trained on 8,192 Ascend NPUs (Kunpeng 920 processors in Huawei Atlas 800T A2 servers).

item.title: PanGu 5.0 Super (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: PanGu 5.0 Super License: partial Type: model https://x.com/faridofanani96/status/1804079517193113850/photo/1

item.title: YunShan (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: YunShan License: closed Type: model Finance + law fine-tune of PanGu-π

item.title: PanGu-Pi (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: PanGu-Pi License: closed Type: model Dense, named PanGu-π

item.title: Pangu 3.0 (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: closed Type: model AI model by Huawei

item.title: Pangu-Weather (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 256M License: open Type: model AI model by Huawei

item.title: PanGu-Sigma (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: PanGu-Sigma License: closed Type: model Sparse. 1.085T parameters named PanGu-Σ.

item.title: PanGu-Coder (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: PanGu-Coder License: closed Type: model Python via GH
